# Whizzpack

> Manufacturer and exporter of corrugated boxes and custom cotton seed bags from Rajkot, Gujarat, India. Factory-direct supply to importers in the USA, UK, Europe, and worldwide. ISO certified. MOQ 5,000 units. No middlemen.

## Products

- [Corrugated Boxes](https://www.whizzpack.in/corrugated-boxes): RSC cartons, die-cut boxes, double wall, triple wall, and custom printed corrugated packaging. 3-ply to 7-ply. All flute types (A, B, C, E, BC, ACC). MOQ 5,000 units. Lead time 15-20 days production + 25-35 days sea freight to USA/UK.
- [Cotton Seed Bags](https://www.whizzpack.in/cotton-seed-bags): 100% natural cotton, food-grade, biodegradable. Drawstring pouches, muslin bags, heavy cotton sacks, bulk agricultural sacks. Custom printed up to 8 colours. OEKO-TEX and GOTS certification available. MOQ 5,000 bags.

## Blog

- [Sourcing Packaging from India: What US & UK Importers Actually Want to Know](https://www.whizzpack.in/blogs/why-import-packaging-from-india)
- [Corrugated Boxes from India: A Practical Guide for US & UK Buyers](https://www.whizzpack.in/blogs/how-to-import-corrugated-boxes-from-india)
- [Cotton Seed Bags from India: Questions UK & US Buyers Ask Before Their First Order](https://www.whizzpack.in/blogs/cotton-seed-bags-sourcing-guide-usa-uk)

## Key Facts

- Location: Plot 47, GIDC Industrial Estate, Rajkot, Gujarat 360001, India
- Founded: 2021
- Certifications: ISO 9001
- Export markets: USA, UK, EU, Canada, Australia
- Contact: info.whizzpack@yahoo.com | +91 83209 07574
- Free samples available for US and UK buyers
- Sea freight: India to US East Coast ~25-30 days; India to UK ~18-22 days
